title: Elbaf’s Children Are in Danger
description: On pages 14–15, this part follows Unknown person #13, Luffy, Unknown person #14, Robin, Gerd, King Harald as Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.
scene: Elbaf’s school, underworld, and giant society fall into crisis as children, giants, and the Straw Hats react to dangerous forces moving beneath the island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Oh my! Those are quite sharp!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: OOM!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: PRINCIPAL!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I can't move...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's because I used sleep paralysis on you.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So, this big ol' thing is a television snail? Never heard of it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Summers, try talking through it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You should be able to transmit nationwide.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Got it...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But I'm gonna need a SEC, QILINGAM.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: This one should go down soon.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: He's a former Vice-Admiral.

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: I thought you died on Ohara...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Chopper! Don't move. Stay hidden in my hair...

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Saul!!!

dialogue.speaker: Gerd
dialogue.text: A school... A library?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You should've cut the peaceful crap!!! You're meant to be warriors!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There was a time when your people's might shook the world...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You were supposed to be our mercenaries, right... Harald?!

dialogue.speaker: Gerd
dialogue.text: The CHILDREN...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I'm be gogin' ya... take care of 'em...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm not sure... C'mon!! It's time for your final charge!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: "Hey, ya hear that!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Gi ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha ha

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: ARRGH!!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: king Harald, that bastard!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: He really messed everything up...

summary: This part advances the Elbaf Crisis through 27 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
